case_title: MY JANE TAING CHEN VS. CHASE BANK, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CHEN, MY JANE TAING CHASE BANK, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-19-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUANCE DUE TO VOLUMINOUS DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF MY JANE TAING IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHUI LING TAM, BRANCH MANAGER. HONORABLE MICHELE MCGILL REQUEST THAT A COPY OF THE DEFENDANTS 70 PAGE DISCOVERY BE PROVIDED TO THE PLAINTIFF NOW FOR PREPARATION OF THE NEXT HEARING DATE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-13-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHUI LING TAM, BRANCH MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,043.24 FILED BY CHEN, MY JANE TAING AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MY JANE TAING ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MY JANE TAING AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PLAINTIFF TO TRANSLATE DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MY JANE TAING CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHASE BANK, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
